about.title: About the Information Technology Program
about.subtitle: Secondary Industrial School of Transport - modern education in IT
about.description1: The Information Technology program is a four-year matriculation program that prepares students for work in the dynamically developing field of information technologies. We focus on practical skills combined with theoretical foundations.
about.description2: Our graduates are prepared for direct entry into practice as well as for study at universities with a technical focus.
